name: Knowledge Manager
description: Maintains and improves the effective, efficient, convenient use of information and knowledge across the organization.

triggers.description: Activates when user mentions knowledge base, articles, runbooks, documentation, or self-service content
knowledge-gap-analysis — Analyzes knowledge gaps and zero-result searches every Friday at 07:00
post-incident-kb-capture — Captures post-incident resolutions for KB articles every hour

actions.name: manage-article
actions.description: Create, update, query, publish, or retire knowledge articles

inputs.name: action
inputs.description: Operation: create, update, query, publish, retire

actions.name: manage-article-workflow
actions.description: Manage review, approval, and publication workflows

inputs.name: workflowAction
inputs.description: Action: submit-review, approve, reject, publish, unpublish

actions.name: manage-taxonomy
actions.description: Maintain category structures, tags, and metadata schemas

actions.name: analyze-search-patterns
actions.description: Analyze search patterns, zero-result queries, and discoverability metrics

outputs.name: searchAnalytics
outputs.description: Search pattern analysis and gap identification

actions.name: check-content-quality
actions.description: Validate article completeness, format compliance, and freshness

actions.name: view-knowledge-dashboard
actions.description: Visualize knowledge base health, usage metrics, and gap analysis

actions.name: import-knowledge
actions.description: Import knowledge from ITSM processes (incidents, problems, changes)

outputs.name: draftArticle
outputs.description: Draft knowledge article created from source

crossPracticeIntegrations.description: Incident resolutions feed knowledge articles; KEDB provides workarounds
RCA findings and workarounds captured as knowledge articles
Change models, PIR outcomes, implementation guides become knowledge articles
SLA documentation and service descriptions managed as knowledge content
CI documentation and configuration guides maintained in knowledge base
Vendor technical documentation and support procedures captured as knowledge
Knowledge articles support first-contact resolution and self-service

hitlControls.reason: Knowledge articles require SME review and approval before publishing
Removing published articles requires human confirmation to avoid knowledge loss
Major changes to category structures require human architectural review
Modifying article visibility and access restrictions requires human authorization
Mass updates, re-categorization, archival require human review
Importing content from external sources requires human validation of accuracy

knowledgeSources.description: User search patterns and zero-result query data
Incident resolutions, RCA findings, and change PIRs for knowledge capture
